content: The standard Self-Refine framework for LLMs can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-refinement system that still retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional supervised training or reinforcement learning. This framework turns single-path iterative self-feedback into a multi-perspective search for flaws and improvements that avoids the myopia of sticking to a single initial output's framing.
